notes: **Batch 5 hold-out case** — added 2026-05-08 to validate hybrid-v2's 120k threshold WITHOUT retuning. **First v2 case filling the huge log_size_bucket (>50k lines) corpus-wide gap (was 0/29 through 13-case state).** 89188 lines / 12.3 MB. Three distinct test failures across three packages (cmd/argocd/commands, server, util/db) with two related root-cause categories — one timing-flake assertion + two Go race-detector trips. multi_failure=true. signal_position=scattered: failure markers span L54988→88904 (~62% to ~99% of log, 38% spread). requires_repo_context=true (race conditions need source access). Expected to be a HARD case across ALL methods at hybrid-v2 evaluation: grep over-matches because of the 89k-line size, tail catches only the consolidated summary at L87473-88904 but misses the earlier individual race traces, hybrid-v2 should route to tail (grep tokens > 120k threshold). repo_visibility=public — only ##[error] cache-restore noise at L1182-1196 (tar 'File exists' warnings during Go module cache restore — non-failure).
